nasb.text: You shall make of these a holy anointing oil, a perfume mixture, the work of a perfumer; it shall be a holy anointing oil.

esv.text: And you shall make of these a sacred anointing oil blended as by the perfumer; it shall be a holy anointing oil.

cnv.text: 你要把這些材料製成聖膏油，就是照著香膏配製師的方法配製成的香膏，是要作為聖膏油的。

ccb.text: 按着调制香料的方法制作圣膏油。
